title: Help Loerie Bakkery bake up a hat-trick!
bodyText:
Gallery
                            Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - We’re thrilled to announce that Loerie Bakkery has once again been nominated in the Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards - and with your support, we’re hoping to take home the title of Best Bakery for the third year in a row!


> For the past 29 years, we’ve proudly served the George community with quality, affordability, and heartfelt service.


Photo gallery - Help Loerie Bakkery bake up a hat-trick!

From our ovens - which fire up before 04:00 every morning - come fresh, flavourful favourites: classic breads, rich pies, indulgent cakes, and golden, flaky treats made with only the best ingredients.

Every item is baked with care, and every customer is welcomed like family. Whether you stop by for a quick chat or a sweet escape, your support keeps our ovens warm and our hearts full.

Now, we need your vote to continue this incredible journey. Help us make it three wins in a row by voting Loerie Bakkery as your favourite in the 2025 Best of George Awards!


> Click here to vote: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


Thanks for choosing us - every day, every year.


> Visit our website here.


– Lantie & Morné Gricius, Loerie Bakkery

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
